allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
Import-Module WebAdministration
\\$publishPath = 'D:\\Biggo\\Github\\biggo29.github.io\\publish'
\\$siteName = 'biggo29-portfolio'
\\$port = 8090

if \(Get-Website -Name \\$siteName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) {
    Write-Host 'Site already exists, updating physical path...'
    Set-ItemProperty \\"IIS:\\Sites\\\\$siteName\\" -Name physicalPath -Value \\$publishPath
} else {
    Write-Host 'Creating new IIS site...'
    New-Website -Name \\$siteName -PhysicalPath \\$publishPath -Port \\$port -Force
}
Start-Website -Name \\$siteName
Write-Host 'Done. Site running at http://localhost:'\\$port
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Import-Module WebAdministration
\\$wwwrootPath = 'D:\\Biggo\\Github\\biggo29.github.io\\publish\\wwwroot'
Set-ItemProperty 'IIS:\\Sites\\biggo29-portfolio' -Name physicalPath -Value \\$wwwrootPath
Write-Host 'Physical path updated to:' \\$wwwrootPath
\(Get-Website -Name 'biggo29-portfolio'\).State
" 2>&1)
